story_name: The Titanic: A Journey of Love and Fate
story_overview: A gentle retelling of the Titanic story through the viewpoints of Jack and Rose — two souls from different worlds meeting aboard the grand ship. A brief, passionate connection unfolds against the beauty of the Titanic voyage before fate intervenes. The story focuses on quiet, emotional moments of wonder, love, and farewell, highlighting humanity amid tragedy.

first_frame_prompt: Enormous black-and-white RMS Titanic at dawn beside a lively pier, four cream funnels releasing soft steam, gleaming hull, Edwardian passengers clustered along the gangway in golden morning light.
Jack, a young adult man with tousled sandy-blond hair and simple worn clothes, boards with a worn ticket and eager smile while elegant Edwardian travelers pass nearby.
Rose, a young adult woman with wavy auburn-red hair, ornate wide-brimmed hat, and fine Edwardian dress, stands at the railing facing the sea under gentle gold light.

Jack and Rose's fingertips meet lightly on the rail, warm sunset light blurring the horizon behind smiling faces.

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: young man with sandy-blond hair wearing brown jacket, faded shirt, dark trousers, and white life vest, [Person B]: young woman with wavy auburn-red hair wearing pale dress, lace gloves, and wide-brimmed hat; shot caption: [Person A] and [Person B] wearing life vests, stand on a dark, slanting deck, gripping hands tightly amid cold spray.
